title: Knowledge / RAG Quality — Implementation Plan
summary: TDD implementation plan closing four medium-severity knowledge/RAG-quality findings: DOCX word-merging, vector dimension mismatch, chunk materialization OOM, and sync-queue blocking.
notes: Manifest declares type=DOC. Confirmed: implementation plan with task-by-task TDD structure (failing test → run RED → implement → run GREEN → commit pattern). Produces guidance and test scaffolding for execution, not requirements or decisions. Cross-refs spec (2026-05-12-medium-backlog-design.md).
